{{ item.description or 'No description available.' }}

Price: ${{ '%.2f'|format(item.price|float) }}

Calories: {{ item.calories if item.calories is not none else 'N/A' }} Protein: {{ item.protein if item.protein is not none else 'N/A' }} g Carbs: {{ item.carbohydrates if item.carbohydrates is not none else 'N/A' }} g Fats: {{ item.fats if item.fats is not none else 'N/A' }} g
